allow: Bash(python3 -m gat --config gat/gat.yaml gat/gat.local.yaml --preset fast requirements --rd tasks/task_calculator.md --output tasks/calculator_review.md --logs logs/)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('modelinfo',{}\).get\('general.context_length'\) or 'not found'\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.get\('modelinfo',{}\).items\(\) if 'context' in k.lower\(\) or 'ctx' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); info=d.get\('modelinfo',{}\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in info.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "from crewai import LLM; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(LLM.__init__\); print\([p for p in sig.parameters]\)")
Bash(python3 -m gat --config gat/gat.yaml gat/gat.local.yaml --preset workstation_small requirements --rd tasks/task_calculator.md --output tasks/calculator_review.md --logs logs/)
Bash(python3 -m gat --config gat/gat.yaml gat/gat.local.yaml --preset workstation_small run --rd tasks/task_calculator.md --crew tasks/calculator_crew.yaml --logs logs/)
Bash(awk '/^## Run/{entry=$0; body=""} {body=body"\\n"$0} END{print body}' logs/execution/coder.md)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d.get\('message',{}\); print\('tool_calls:', bool\(m.get\('tool_calls'\)\)\); print\(json.dumps\(m.get\('tool_calls'\), indent=2\) if m.get\('tool_calls'\) else m.get\('content',''\)[:200]\)")
